profile.title: Physical profile
profile.subtitle: Used as the reference for body-weight and age-based scoring. Stored on this device (Core, no account required).
profile.completeBadge: Baseline complete — ready for assessment inputs that use height, weight, age, and gender.
profile.incompleteHint: Add your body data so later assessments can convert real metrics to scores.
profile.isAnonymousInLadder: Hide my identity on ladder (anonymous mode)

errors.invalid-gender: Gender must be male or female.
errors.invalid-height: Height must be between 120 and 230 cm.
errors.invalid-weight: Weight must be between 35 and 250 kg.
errors.invalid-city: For Taiwan, please choose a valid city.
errors.invalid-district: District must belong to the selected city.

ladderIdentity.title: Ladder name & avatar
ladderIdentity.subtitle: Shown on the leaderboard when you upload scores. Stored on this device; avatar is compressed before save.
ladderIdentity.avatarHint: Square photo works best. JPEG/PNG, resized automatically.
ladderIdentity.errorImage: Could not process this image. Try another file or a smaller photo.
ladderIdentity.errorImageTooLarge: Image is still too large after compression. Try a smaller original file.
ladderIdentity.errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.

diagnostics.archetypeHint: Homologation profile derived from your six-axis performance map.

overallGrade.viewDetailHint: Tap to view homologation grade details

BASE.name: STOCK COMMUTER
BASE.desc: Factory architecture still awaiting full unlock.

TIER_40.name: STREET MODIFIED
TIER_40.desc: Entry street tune. Baseline driveline efficiency and throttle response improved.

TIER_50.name: STAGE 1 TUNE
TIER_50.desc: Stage-one calibration. Power platform now taking shape.

TIER_60.name: CLUB TRACK SPEC
TIER_60.desc: Club track build. Chassis rigidity beyond stock norms.

TIER_70.name: TRACKDAY ENTHUSIAST
TIER_70.desc: Weekend hot-lap spec. Control and heat-soak resistance markedly higher.

TIER_80.name: AMATEUR TIME ATTACK
TIER_80.desc: Amateur time-attack class. High fill-rate efficiency with real track pressure.

TIER_90.name: UNLIMITED ATTACK
TIER_90.desc: Unlimited time-attack ruleset. Peak power and grip in perfect mesh.

TIER_100.name: GT4 CHAMPIONSHIP
TIER_100.desc: Regional GT4 homologation. Driveline efficiency at podium threshold.

TIER_110.name: GT3 COMPETITION
TIER_110.desc: Elite international GT3. High torque and max aero in full alignment.

TIER_120.name: GTE PRO SPEC
TIER_120.desc: Pro Le Mans GTE. Dominant mechanical efficiency under extreme sustained load.

TIER_130.name: FACTORY PROTOTYPE
TIER_130.desc: Factory prototype racer. Perfect mechanics under full-load high-pressure output.

TIER_140.name: HYPERCAR TIER
TIER_140.desc: Top hypercar class. Unbelievable transient launch reserve.

LEGEND.name: LEGENDARY MONSTER
LEGEND.desc: Legendary build monster. The ultimate crystallization of pure mechanical will.

PANTHEON.name: PANTHEON EXPERIMENTAL
PANTHEON.desc: Pantheon experimental. Beyond normal definition — data archived to the Pantheon.
PANTHEON.representativeCar: Red Bull RB20 / ultimate F1 spec

home.overallFormula: Sum of six core scores ÷ 6 (arm circumference excluded).
home.radarWeakestHint: Current bottleneck: {{axis}} ({{score}}). Prioritize this axis next.
